reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion. Cuenta con lubricentro y tienen serviclub. Si hay demora a 800 metros hay otra ypf que tambien atiende muy bien y tienen boxes y serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
Very good station. It has a lube center and a service club. If there's a delay, there's another YPF station 800 meters away that also provides excellent service and has service bays and a service club.
